query:
SELECT 
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.productSku,
  pv.sellingPriceRMB,
  pv.sellingPriceFOB,
  pv.costPriceRMB,
  pv.isDefault
FROM product_variants pv
ORDER BY pv.productSku, pv.isDefault DESC, pv.variantCode
LIMIT 20;
